testCases.description: Tap sync button on dashboard — no crash, sync completes or shows empty message
steps: On Dashboard, tap sync button (if present)
Verify: no crash, no red screen

testCases.description: Profile → My Truck Inventory navigates and renders
Profile → Sync Status navigates and renders
Profile → Personal Information navigates and renders
steps: Verify: PersonalInfoScreen renders with user name/email

testCases.description: Profile → My Vehicle navigates and renders
steps: Verify: MyVehicleScreen renders (vehicle card or "no vehicle" message)

testCases.description: Profile → Time Entries navigates and renders
steps: Verify: TimeEntriesListScreen renders with list or empty state
Verify: DocumentsScreen renders with "No documents" message
Verify: NotificationsScreen renders with list or empty state

testCases.description: Profile → Help & Support navigates and renders
steps: Verify: HelpScreen renders with FAQ and support info

testCases.description: No "Coming Soon" alerts appear for any menu item
steps: Tap each of the 9 menu items
Verify: all navigate to screens, none show "Coming Soon" alert
